title: LOW: No explicit JSON depth limit on inbox parse
description: File: server.rs, Line: 657. serde_json::from_str(body) to Value relies on serde_json's built-in 128-level recursion limit (added in 1.0.111+). Body is already capped at 256KB. This is likely sufficient, but an explicit depth check would be defense-in-depth. Fix: verify Cargo.lock has serde_json >= 1.0.111, add a comment documenting the reliance on the built-in limit.
close_reason: Verified serde_json 1.0.150 in Cargo.lock (built-in 128-level recursion limit since 1.0.111). Added documenting comment at parse site.
